productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men White Sprint Star Sports Shoes
description: The sleek styling of the Sprint Star 2 M shoes from adidas cuts through the air and the snug Fit provides the security needed for producing great sprints. This shoe makes for a terrific choice for beginning and intermediate level sprinters.UpperSynthetic upper with Adidas patented 3-Stripes in a contrast colour for durability and styleLace ups for a snug and customised fitSynthetic tongue with a cut out design for enhanced breathable comfortFabric lining and padded heel collar MidsoleSlightly padded footbed for all day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole on the forefoot and textured TPU on the midsole and heelThe Sprint Star two Includes fourteen 1/4" slim spikes and a spike wrenchCleats for enhanced grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
